title: Digital Support for Climate Resilience
shortDescription: High-resolution climate modeling for designers and planners. Urban heat island, flood risk, and microclimate analysis for buildings, districts, infrastructure, for today's and future demands.
longDescription: Our climate resilience practice delivers comprehensive, data-driven risk assessments through a combination of proprietary tools and high-resolution climate modelling. We offer the integration of an urban heat island mapping, extreme weather analysis, and model geometry assessment as an "one-stop solution" to evaluate the climate exposure of buildings, districts, and even whole cities. The core of our climate resilience workflow is based on our in-house weather analysis tool, purpose-built to process and interpret meteorological data with the precision and flexibility that other common off-the-shelf solutions cannot match. All offered services are based on the latest AI technologies, allowing automating data flows between climate models, geospatial analysis, and reporting to ensure consistency and speed across every assessment. Our climate risk assessment approach goes beyond standard risk analysing and reporting. We translate climate projections and site-specific conditions into actionable design guidance and embed it early in the infrastructure design process, it's not just conducted as a compliance exercise at the end. From heat stress and flood vulnerability to microclimate optimization, our assessment approach supports both resilient design decisions and sustainability certification requirements.
